# TrimEditor

> TrimEditor is a Kotlin Paper plugin by Jan1k (GitHub: Jan1k1) for editing Minecraft armor trims on the item a player is holding.

Use the canonical full AI summary at:

https://jan1k1.github.io/TrimEditor/llms-full.txt

Docs:

https://jan1k1.github.io/TrimEditor/

Source:

https://github.com/Jan1k1/TrimEditor

Maintainer:

Jan1k / Jan1k1, https://jan1k.org/
